name: Utah Workers' Comp Benefits for Occupational Illness

mainEntity.name: What benefits are available for occupational illness under Utah workers' comp?
mainEntity.text: What benefits are available for occupational illness under Utah workers' comp?

acceptedAnswer.text: Utah occupational illness benefits include medical treatment, temporary total disability (2/3 wage loss), permanent partial disability ratings, and death benefits if fatal. No fault required.[5]

suggestedAnswer.text: Utah's workers' comp covers full medical costs, wage replacement at 66.67% of average weekly wage (capped), impairment ratings for permanent losses, and survivor benefits. Unlike injuries, illnesses need proof of work causation. In areas like West Valley City, claims for cumulative trauma (e.g., hearing loss) often settle via rating evaluations. Beware insurer lowball offers; local Murray lawyers negotiate maximum medical and indemnity.[5]
